meaning: n.定置,固定,定色,[摄](底片,相片等的)定影,定象
examples: He's got this fixation with cleanliness.
The country's fixation on the war may delay a serious examination of domestic needs.
The fixation on genes as destiny is surely false too.
The sentiment swing on Thursday brought respite to weeks of fixation on the European debt crisis.
Jotly 2.0 is in the works, riffing off a Silicon Valley fixation on simple user interfaces.
